subject: Re: bin1 refinement
body:
Dear Hamid,

For doing local searches in RELION: it depends whether you are in 3D
classification or 3D auto-refine:

   - For 3D classification: yes, you have to use --sigma_ang (or
   --sigma_psi, --sigma_rot, --sigma_tilt accordingly)
   - For 3D auto-refine: it works differently because of the adaptive
   sampling heuristic, there you have to make sure you start with the same
   values for "Initial angular sampling" and "Local searches from
   auto-sampling", for example:

[image: image.png]

Good luck!

--
Ricardo Diogo Righetto


Em seg., 28 de ago. de 2023 às 19:57, Hamidreza Rahmani <hamid13r@gmail.com>
escreveu:

> Thanks Ricardo,
>
> Sorry I just realized somehow my response wasn't posted!
>
> I am having memory problems in RELION. There are weird problems in Warp/M
> as well, like I can extract the subvolumes as imageseries but cannot do
> subvolumes without many weird errors (ended up splitting into separate
> tilt-series and then let go of some of them).
>
> I am trying relion with the free_gpu_memory now. For local alignments, do
> you use --sigma_ang?
>
> Best,
> Hamid
>
> On Thursday, August 24, 2023 at 11:09:06 PM UTC-7 ricardo...@gmail.com
> wrote:
>
>> Hi Hamid,
>>
>> Are you having problems with GPU memory in RELION or in Warp? It was not
>> clear to me from your post.
>>
>> In RELION, you can try explicitly telling it to limit GPU memory usage in
>> relion_refine, for example:
>> --free_gpu_memory 1000
>>
>> Memory management works much better when you do that.
>>
>> Also make sure that you are only performing local searches (not global)
>> at this point.
>>
>> Best wishes,
>>
>> --
>> Ricardo Diogo Righetto
>>
>> Em qui., 24 de ago. de 2023 22:17, Hamidreza Rahmani <hami...@gmail.com>
>> escreveu:
>>
>>> Dear all,
>>>
>>> I was wondering if anyone has done a refinement at bin 1 (apix=1.66A)
>>> with box size of 256?
>>>
>>> I have a lot of problems with extraction and some tilt-series just dont
>>> work (even though they work fine at bin2 or pixel size of 2.5A!!!). After
>>> breaking into individual tilt-series and going to relion I cannot refine bc
>>> I run out of GPU memory.  I have access to GPUs  with 48G of memory and
>>> only using 1 thread per GPU.
>>>
>>> Am I doing something wrong? or do I just need even bigger GPUs?
>>>
>>> Best,
>>> Hamid
>>>
